Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Angling legend Jimmy Houston takes us on his most successful trips with big fish and hilarious antics.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jimmy Houston Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows how effective the drop shot can be on Bass during the extreme heat of Summer.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | When its Hot... Drop Shot!.mp4
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join the FishON! TV crew as we tackle rugged Northern Ontario terrain with our Polaris Ranger equipped with a custom boat rack. This remote expedition takes us deep into the wilderness to an untouched lake known for its walleye bounty. From the adrenaline of the journey to the thrill of the catch, this episode is packed with adventure, stunning scenery, and fishing tips you won’t want to miss!
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Trailblazing to Trophy Walleye: Polaris Ranger Adventure
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.grandparentTitle: Spring Fishing Tips and Tricks
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In this exciting episode of FishON!, we hit the legendary Bay of Quinte with none other than Dicki (Richard Sommerville), the ice fishing legend himself. With years of experience and a knack for finding trophy walleye, Dicki helps us navigate the ever-changing ice conditions and put our gear to the test. From early morning setups to heart-pounding battles with giant Quinte gold, this episode is packed with action, expert tips, and stunning winter scenery. Don't miss the ultimate ice fishing adventure!
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Ice Fishing Giants on Bay of Quinte

Image.alt: FishON | Ice Fishing Giants on Bay of Quinte
FishON | Ice Fishing Giants on Bay of Quinte
FishON | Ice Fishing Giants on Bay of Quinte

Video.summary: Venice Adventure
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast - Venice Adventure
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: James Lindner and Jake Wallace head to Sturgeon Lake in Sunset Country to catch walleyes, pike and lake trout.
Video.grandparentTitle: Linder's Angling Edge | Fishing Ontario’s Sturgeon Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe Hook Em'
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro vs Joe - Hook Em'
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Walleye fishing early spring walleye in the Ivanhoe River.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON | Ivanhoe Walleye
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hot summer Jigging rap walleye on Ivanhoe Lake with our local anglers and big bags of walleye.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON | Summer Jigging
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This week on larry smith outdoors we head up north for alittle musky fishing. Jeff is easily the most knowledgeable musky fisherman i've ever met and you'll learn why i think that in this episode. Stay Tuned
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors | Musky Tips with JEff VanRemortel
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Pitching and flipping are effective methods to catch Bass in shallow waters, undercover trees, and grass. Shea heads out solo skiff fishing for Bass in Lake Perris. He explains his techniques and tests out a topwater frog lure at dusk.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Flipping and Pitching Lake Perris, CA, Part One
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The FishON! team ventures to the scenic Nagagamisis Lake, northwest of Hearst, Ontario. Joined by long-time friend Sebastian Lizotte, the day unfolds into an exhilarating fishing adventure with non-stop walleye action—over 60 catches in a single day! This episode highlights the thrill of angling in Northern Ontario's untouched wilderness.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Furious Walleye Action on Nagagamisis Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This weeks episode we do somethingi've never done before. we ice fish lake trout but we can see about 30 feet down through the clear water
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors | Sight Fishing Giant Lake Trout
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Lunker redfish put tackle to the test on jetties of the Mississippi River Delta in Louisiana.
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast — Jetty Reds
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hook n' Look returns to Carter's Lake with guide, Louie Bartenfield. He and host, Kim Stricker employ TG Finesse Football Jigs along steep banks and the endeavor pays off with some southern bling!
Video.grandparentTitle: Hook 'n Look — Georgia Jewelry
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: One of the best trips on the planet is fishing for Peacock Bass in the Amazon River "aka The Rio Negro." Fishing on the Blackwater Explorer with Acute Angling is a real bucket list trip. Shea McIntee and the crew spend a full day fishing for some of the hardest fighting bass.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Fishing For Monster Amazon Peacock Bass, Part One
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Former U.S. Army Sergeant and former Alaska State Trooper, Erik Hill hits the Wisconsin waters to lure more than just bass to the surface. He shares the story of his life, his service, and his struggles since returning from war.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Army Veteran Erik Hill
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman’s Pro vs Joe -Battle at Benbrook
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro vs Joe - Battle at Benbrook
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Stoked On Fishing jumps on board the Top Gun 80 out of San Diego, California, for Stan Vanderburg's annual five-day Rod & Reel Radio charter. We go offshore and have an absolute blast. The trip starts with trophy class bluefin tuna weighing in from 70 - 95 pounds!
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Epic Five Day Fishing Charter on the Top One 80
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Al and James Lindner use the new Rapala PXR Mavrik 110 Jerkbait to catch both smallmouth and walleyes.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Multispecies Mavriks
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows you how to build a hair jig rod, with detailed instruction from one of his Signature Series rod kits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | The Perfect Hair Jig Rod
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dusitn takes on classic Fall conditions explaining the best ways to approach bass throughout the day.
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | Fall Changes
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows you, in detail how to build your own Ned Rig rod.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Building A Ned Rig Rod
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Today on Stoked On Fishing, we head offshore on the Stoked On Fishing Charters 35-foot Everglades with an All-Star crew searching for bluefin tuna. We take out Okuma Fishing Tackles President Doug and John, head of product development. We also have on board Colin and his wife, Amanda from Grundens, and our friend Toby from Mag Bay Lures and Mag Bay Resort down in Baja, Mexico. This trip was absolutely nuts, with the best Blue Fin Tuna fishing we have seen in Sothern California all year.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Southern California Bluefin Tuna Fishing at Its Finest, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: On today's episode of AnglingBuzz TV, we're talking all about finding walleye and how to catch them! Our special guest is Jason Freed who's a fishing guide on Minnesota's famous Leech Lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - Finding Walleye
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin fishes a finesse topwater bait for bass in Early Summer
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | Tiny Topwater Fun
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A few years back, we rallied up with my buddy Chris Atkins who owns and operates Central America fishing. He told me, Shea, you have to do a Stoked On Fishing Charters Panama trip and fish at Coiba National Park. It's the largest island in Central America, next to the world-famous Hannibal Bank. Needless to say, we rallied up the troops and made our way down south; it's only six hours from LAX our first Adventure was incredible, and that's precisely why we're returning for our second time.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Stoked on Coiba National Park, Panama: Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This episode is all about Swimbaits, perhaps the most versatile tool in the tackle box for catching just about everything that swims.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - All About Swimbaits
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing can be very high-tech, but on the other end of the spectrum, it can actually be very simple. Today we're going to show you some presentations and tactics to put fish in the boat....easily!
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - Easy Fishing Tactics
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim talks charter fishing with Capt. Steve Hunsucker of the Reel Deal Sportfishing charter in Clearwater, Florida.
Video.grandparentTitle: Slickfish Radio | Capt. Steve Hunsucker
Video.title: Episode 1
